full_suite.failure_notes: Thirty prior failures reproduced: 18 court/data failures; 8 sandbox socket-bind failures; test_public_eval_persists_probability_maxima_and_nonfinite_count; test_real_scaffold_tool_index_matches_checked_in_schema; and 2 storage-policy tests. Five current-only failures were test_export_builds_guarded_whole_source_dataset_and_pending_human_pack, test_export_never_admits_adjacent_bucket_or_nc_source, test_export_reports_and_excludes_impossible_box_without_dropping_valid_image, test_exhaustive_multiscale_phash_collision_refuses_before_yolo_materialization, and test_retention_negative_is_reported_without_massaging_pool. Those unrelated exporter tests subsequently passed 26/26 in isolation. The prior flight-simulator timing failure passed.

honest_issues: The mandatory full suite remains non-green, so the objective is PARTIAL despite the owned suite and real judge passing.
Five failures are current-only versus the known 31-failure set, although their unrelated test file passed completely in isolation.
Storage audit still fails on six holdout-evaluation tracked artifacts and one PBV untracked video outside this lane.
BALL remains ball_verified=false; BALL_CLEAN_JUDGE certifies the data judge, not model accuracy or product verification.
Unrelated dirty worktree changes were preserved.
next: Rerun the wide suite after the parallel exporter lane stabilizes; do not weaken the new attestation, provenance, lineage-hash, or protected-set gates.
